problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient may resolve How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
